summary: Classified the hydrated plugin duplicate-warning cluster without direct GitHub mutation. The original representative #42192 is closed and already replaced historically; the live non-security canonical tracker is #42099. Security-sensitive PR #72409 must be quarantined. Open PR #58796 is related but not mergeable or closable in this pass because it is broad and has an unresolved P1 Codex review finding. Closed refs are retained as historical evidence only.
